decisions: 2026-03-20: 1 PRD — pure cron infrastructure, no global manual trigger
2026-03-20: No global Run Now — per-repo triggers handled in release monitoring PRD
2026-03-20: Schedule status (last run, next run) shown as subtle notice on settings page
2026-03-20: Rate limit retry = separate one-time cron event, does not affect the recurring schedule
2026-03-20: Intervals: hourly, twice daily, daily, weekly — configurable in settings
